title: turnera pumilea var. pumilea
intro: Turnera pumilea var. pumilea, also known as the "Small Leaf Turnera" or "Pumila", is a species of flowering plant in the family Passifloraceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, such as indigestion, diarrhea, and dyspepsia, due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Turnera pumilea var. pumilea include relief from menstrual cramps, menopausal symptoms, and anxiety, as well as its potential in reducing inflammation and improving sleep quality. Traditionally, the plant is prepared in herbal tea, infusions, or as a tincture, often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
